title: Senior Financial Analyst - Zerodha - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Zerodha - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Zerodha in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zerodha:
Zerodha is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha!
